user.title: Vorwerk account
user.description:
Enter the email address of your MyKobold account to receive a one-time login code.

See [Vorwerk documentation]({docs_url}).

code.title: Vorwerk account
code.description:
Enter the code you received by email.

See [Vorwerk documentation]({docs_url}).

custom_cleaning.name: Start custom cleaning
custom_cleaning.description: Start a cleaning run with explicit Vorwerk cleaning parameters.

mode.name: Cleaning mode
mode.description: Set the cleaning mode: 1 for eco, 2 for turbo.

navigation.name: Navigation mode
navigation.description: Set the navigation mode: 1 for normal, 2 for extra care, 3 for deep.

category.name: Map usage
category.description: Set whether to clean without a map (2) or using a persistent map (4).

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: Optional zone name for robots that support mapped boundary cleaning.
